title: boehmeria subintegra
intro: Boehmeria subintegra, also known as Tieh Ta Chiao or Chinese nettle, is a type of perennial plant native to China, Taiwan, and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria subintegra include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Boehmeria subintegra can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, decoction, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
